comments.body: Code committed 86fa756e (feat/gerrit-ci-verified-gate): Verified label + ACL + INACTIVE submit-req + ADR-0020 + doc. Operator-pending: activate the SR (delete applicableIf=is:false, re-push) after E2E — see infra/runbooks/two-vote-gate-rollback.md.

compiled_state.description:
# S1 — Gerrit gate config: `Verified` label + two-vote submit requirement

Part of epic 1fa8 (CI as a second Gerrit gate vote via gerrit-to-platform → GitHub Actions).

## Why
The gate today is a single vote (`LLM-Review` only). Adding an independent CI vote requires a
`Verified` label plus a submit requirement that demands it, mirroring the existing `LLM-Review`
label/SR pattern in `infra/gerrit/project.config`.

## What
Add the `Verified` label + submit-requirement + voting ACL, and record the gate-architecture
change (two independent votes) as an ADR superseding/amending ADR-0013.

## Scope
- `infra/gerrit/project.config` (label + submit-requirement + `label-Verified` ACL).
- New ADR superseding/amending ADR-0013; update the gate section of `docs/gerrit-aws-setup.md`.
- **The submit-requirement ACTIVATION is deferred** until the voter is proven (done in S6) — this
  story authors the config; S6 flips it on. Out of scope: the workflow, g2p, credentials.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Add `[label "Verified"]` (function `NoBlock`, values -1/0/+1, `defaultValue = 0`,
      `copyCondition = changekind:NO_CODE_CHANGE`) to `infra/gerrit/project.config`, mirroring the
      `LLM-Review` label block.
- [ ] Add `[submit-requirement "Verified"] submittableIf = label:Verified=MAX` and grant the CI
      service-account group `label-Verified = -1..+1` (Service Users only; devs cannot self-vote).
- [ ] The intended final gate is `label:LLM-Review=MAX AND label:Verified=MAX AND -has:unresolved`;
      the `Verified` submit-requirement is left inactive/enforcement-deferred until S6 proves the
      voter (avoids blocking all submits during rollout).
- [ ] Write an ADR that supersedes/amends **ADR-0013** documenting the two-independent-vote gate.
- [ ] Update the gate section of `docs/gerrit-aws-setup.md` to describe both votes.
compiled_state.title: S1 — Gerrit gate config: Verified label + two-vote submit requirement
